prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1UZ-FE V8 (4.0L, 32-valve, quad-cam) with a custom bellhousing adapter for the R151 transmission, utilizing a Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R, 60mm inducer) on a custom tubular manifold with Tial 44mm external wastegate and 3-inch stainless downpipe

Full custom wiring harness by Wireworks Japan, integrating a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with dual Bosch 028 injectors (850cc/min) and a custom intercooler setup (GReddy Type-S front-mount, 22x6x3.5 inches) with silicone couplers from Samco Sport

Chassis reinforcement via Cusco 4-point roll cage (bolt-in, mild steel) and custom subframe braces (aluminum 6061-T6, 3mm thickness) paired with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for 1.5-ton curb weight) and polybushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K)
estetica: Rocket Bunny LiteAce-specific widebody kit (Pandem Type-1, fiberglass construction) with custom fender flares (3-inch extended, riveted and bonded) and a carbon fiber hood (Seibon, 2x2 twill, 1.5mm thickness) featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow

Custom rear diffuser by Veilside (Fujita-style, 3-piece ABS plastic) with integrated dual 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (stainless steel, rolled tips) and a front lip spoiler by TRD (JDM-spec, 1990s Group A homologation piece, polyurethane)

Enkei PF07 wheels (15x9 +15 offset, 5x114.3 PCD) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (225/45/15) with custom center caps (laser-etched LiteAce logo) and Duraflex side skirts (JDM-spec, bolt-on, pre-painted in Toyota Super White II)
